title: Refactor: Split large class into smaller classes
original_text: Refactored a large 2000-line class into smaller focused classes. Identified responsibilities and extracted separate classes. Created ValidationHelper, FormattingHelper, and DataProcessor classes. Main class now coordinates these helpers. This improves readability and maintainability. Added tests for all extracted classes. Result: 44 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(cleanup): split large class into smaller focused classes
expected_body_lines: - Make main class coordinate helper classes
- Add tests for all extracted classes
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(cleanup): split large class into smaller focused classes"
